response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings solid full-stack engineering depth and some high-throughput distributed systems experience, but the resume shows no meaningful alignment with the core requirements of this Principal-level role. There is no evidence of experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout automation, telemetry systems, or growth engineering — which are the central technical pillars of the position. The candidate is operating at a Senior/Staff level rather than the Principal/IC6 seniority required, and demonstrates no cross-team architectural ownership or org-wide technical influence at the expected scale.
strengths: Broad language fluency (TypeScript, C++, Java, D, C#) across production systems spanning 15+ years of industry experience
High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, handling millions of HTTP requests per second using low-latency async I/O patterns
Active open-source contributor and community educator with talks, workshops, and self-directed platform projects demonstrating initiative beyond core job duties
concerns: Zero evidence of experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, or rollout automation — the central technical requirement of this role
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis, or data science partnership experience visible anywhere in the resume
Seniority gap: operating at Senior/Staff IC level with no demonstrated cross-team architectural leadership, org-wide technical strategy, or Principal-scope ownership

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
